package.json.general_idea: Update Node.js engine requirement to version 14.15.0 or higher to align with JDK 11 era tooling standards.
package.json.why_exists: Older Node.js versions (e.g., 0.12) are incompatible with modern build tools and dependencies required for the new JHipster version, causing installation or runtime failures.

package.json.general_idea: Replace Grunt-based build scripts with Angular CLI and Webpack-based scripts.
package.json.why_exists: Grunt is removed from dependencies; the old scripts would fail because the 'grunt' command is no longer available.

package.json.general_idea: Add Angular framework dependencies for the new frontend stack.
package.json.why_exists: The application now uses Angular 11, requiring these core libraries to compile and run.

package.json.general_idea: Add Angular CLI and build tooling dependencies.
package.json.why_exists: Required for the new build process (ng serve, ng build) to function.
The project migrates from Karma/Jasmine to Jest for unit testing.
The project structure and generated code are tied to this specific generator version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target JDK 11 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce incompatible bytecode if the source/target version is not updated to match the target JDK 11 environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation dependency with explicit javax.annotation-api to handle module system changes in JDK 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation package was removed from the JDK in Java 11, causing NoClassDefFoundError or compile errors if not explicitly provided.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Boot version from 1.2.5.RELEASE to 2.3.7.RELEASE to support JDK 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 1.x does not support JDK 11; the application will fail to start or compile due to API incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add mapstruct-processor dependency to enable annotation processing for MapStruct in modern build environments.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without the processor, MapStruct interfaces will not be implemented, leading to compile errors or runtime failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin to explicitly set source and target to the new Java version variable.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce incorrect bytecode if source/target levels are not updated to match the target JDK (11).

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-enforcer-plugin to require Java version compatible with JDK 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Build will fail on JDK 11 if the enforcer rule still restricts Java to older versions (e.g., JDK 8 only).

pom.xml.general_idea: Update JIB Maven plugin base image to use an OpenJDK 11 runtime.
pom.xml.why_exists: Docker image build will fail or produce an incompatible image if the base image does not support JDK 11.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate from Spring Boot 1.x Actuator configuration to Spring Boot 2.x Actuator configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x removed the `management.security.enabled` and `security.basic.enabled` properties and changed the namespace for endpoint exposure from `endpoints.*` to `management.endpoints.*` and `management.endpoint.*`. Without this change, the application fails to start or actuator endpoints are not exposed correctly on the target JDK/Spring Boot version.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
management.security.enabled: true
security.basic.enabled: false
endpoints.jolokia.enabled: false
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      base-path: /management
      exposure:
        include: ['configprops', 'env', 'health', 'info', 'jhimetrics', 'logfile', 'loggers', 'prometheus', 'threaddump']
  endpoint:
    health:
      show-details: when_authorized
      roles: 'ROLE_ADMIN'

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate async task configuration from custom JHipster properties to standard Spring Boot 2.x `spring.task` properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x standardizes async configuration under `spring.task.execution` and `spring.task.scheduling`. The old custom `async:` block is no longer recognized by the auto-configuration, leading to default thread pool settings being used instead of the intended configuration.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
spring:
  task:
    execution:
      thread-name-prefix: jhipster-mongodb-sample-application-task-
      pool:
        core-size: 2
        max-size: 50
        queue-capacity: 10000
    scheduling:
      thread-name-prefix: jhipster-mongodb-sample-application-scheduling-
      pool:
        size: 2

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate mail configuration from custom JHipster properties to standard Spring Boot 2.x `spring.mail` properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x expects mail configuration under `spring.mail.*`. The old custom `mail:` block is ignored by the `JavaMailSender` auto-configuration, causing mail services to fail or use incorrect defaults.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
mail:
    host: localhost
    port: 25
    username:
    password:
    protocol: smtp
    tls: false
    auth: false
    from: jhipster@localhost

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Migrate Swagger configuration from custom JHipster properties to standard Springdoc/Swagger 2.x properties.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.why_exists: The old `swagger:` block uses properties specific to older JHipster/Swagger versions. Spring Boot 2.x migrations typically involve updating to Swagger 2.x or Springdoc, which require different property names (e.g., `terms-of-service-url` instead of `termsOfServiceUrl`). Without this, API documentation may not render correctly.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.before:
swagger:
    title: jhipster API
    description: jhipster applications and beyond!
    version: 0.0.1
    termsOfServiceUrl: http://jhipster.github.io/
    contact:
    license: Apache 2.0
    licenseUrl: http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0.html
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.after:
jhipster:
  api-docs:
    default-include-pattern: /api/.*
    title: jhipsterMongodbSampleApplication API
    description: jhipsterMongodbSampleApplication API documentation
    version: 0.0.1
    terms-of-service-url:
    contact-name:
    contact-url:
    contact-email:
    license: unlicensed
    license-url:
